title: Commvault Backup Job
description: Represents a backup job in Commvault, tracking the execution of a data protection operation including its status, progress, data transfer metrics, and associated client and subclient information.

jobId.description: Unique identifier for the backup job

enum: Completed w/ one or more errors
Completed w/ one or more warnings

subclient.description: The subclient associated with this job

elapsedTimeSeconds.description: Total elapsed time of the job in seconds

sizeOfBackupBytes.description: Total size of application data processed in bytes

sizeOfMediaOnDiskBytes.description: Total size of data written to storage media in bytes

numOfFiles.description: Number of files processed during the job

failureReason.description: Reason for job failure if the job did not complete successfully

storagePolicyName.description: Name of the storage policy used for data placement

mediaAgent.description: Name of the media agent that processed the job

isAged.description: Whether the job data has been aged out (pruned by retention policy)
